vocab.meaning: vượt trội, ở một đẳng cấp cao hơn
vocab.example: While I appreciate my homeland, I must admit that the mountain vistas in Switzerland are a cut above anything I've seen locally.

vocab.meaning: gợi lên sự đồng cảm/cảm xúc sâu sắc
vocab.example: The rustic, familiar charm of the Vietnamese countryside strikes a chord with me in a way that foreign cityscapes simply cannot.

vocab.meaning: tốt hơn một chút/cao hơn một bậc
vocab.example: For me, the architectural grandeur of European squares is a notch above the modern skylines found in my own country.

vocab.meaning: mê hoặc/cuốn hút ai đó hoàn toàn
vocab.example: The sheer scale of the Grand Canyon can hold any traveler in thrall, offering a perspective that is entirely alien to my domestic experience.

vocab.meaning: phần giá trị nhất/đẹp nhất của một thứ gì đó
vocab.example: Ha Long Bay is undoubtedly the jewel in the crown of my country's natural scenery, and few places abroad can rival it.

vocab.meaning: trở nên mờ nhạt khi so sánh với
vocab.example: After seeing the Northern Lights in Norway, many other night-time views I've encountered tend to pale in comparison.

vocab.meaning: khiến ai đó vô cùng kinh ngạc/phấn khích
vocab.example: The futuristic skyline of Tokyo absolutely blew my mind when I first beheld it from a skyscraper observatory.
The coastal views in the central part of my country are second to none, providing a unique blend of mountains and turquoise water.
The arid desert landscapes of the Middle East are a far cry from the lush, tropical greenery that defines my own country.

vocab.meaning: xác nhận/đảm bảo cho chất lượng/vẻ đẹp của cái gì
vocab.example: I can personally vouch for the therapeutic effect of gazing at the serene lakes in my homeland after a stressful month.
